mechanism: Fiscal income support via deficit spending prevents the demand contraction needed for the traditional price self-correction mechanism to operate. Consumers maintain purchasing power through transfers, so supply shocks persist and accumulate rather than triggering the demand-destruction feedback that historically normalized prices.
regime_dependence: Operative when fiscal transfers maintain household purchasing power during supply shocks; confirmed by 2021-22 natural experiment where food volumes declined 2-3% vs 8-12% in 2008.
